findings.evidence: Existing precedent is `HopfAlgebra.pointsFunctor` at `code/TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/PointsFunctor.lean:97`; `rg -n "FunctorFunctor" code mathlib` only hits this new declaration and its generated companion names.
findings.fix: Rename it to `CommHopfAlgCat.pointsFunctor` and rename the companion lemmas to `pointsFunctor_obj`, `pointsFunctor_map`, and `pointsFunctor_map_app_apply_apply`, mirroring the existing fixed-Hopf-algebra API.
findings.issue: `pointsFunctorFunctor` names the standard functor of points by appending `Functor` twice, which is not Mathlib/TauCeti terminology and makes the main API harder to discover.

summary: One public name uses nonstandard terminology for the main API; no notation issues found.
